admissible_domain_constraints: x is a real three-channel response-magnitude vector, not a raw signed or complex wave-amplitude vector
at least one physical interaction, detector-boundary, or measurement-support coupling is active
zero support maps to the null BHSM mass contribution and is outside the normalized active cone
claim_boundary: The quadratic-form proof is exact on the stated response cone. Its physical applicability is conditional on the author-ontology response-magnitude domain and does not establish raw-kernel PSD.
proof_method: exact entrywise copositivity on the nonnegative response cone
proof_steps: On the admissible domain, each response coordinate x_i is nonnegative.
The exact kernel has no negative entry.
Every displayed monomial is nonnegative for x_i>=0.
Therefore q(x)>=0 on the full response cone by exact termwise sign analysis.
The normalized-cone minimum is 0, attained at x=(1,0,0).
remaining_missing_object: complete-action derivation of the measurement-supported response cone
